About Us

Trusted Herbal Wellness from Nature

Jinja Herbal Extracts is a flagship product of Multistream Limited, a herbal health company dedicated to producing highly effective organic health products and supplements that support the body's natural ability to heal.

Our leading product, the Jinja Extract drink, has brought real relief to thousands of clients facing a wide range of health challenges. The testimonies from those who have used it speak for themselves.

  • Made from the finest natural herbs with no harmful chemicals
  • Supports immune health, digestion, and overall body wellness
  • Formulated to address both men's and women's health needs
  • NAFDAC registered and quality assured
Explore Our Products
Why Choose Jinja

Key Health Benefits

Jinja Herbal Extracts supports your body from the inside out, naturally and effectively.

Boosts Immunity

Strengthens your body's natural defenses against infections, bacteria, fungi, and viral diseases.

Deep Detox

Cleanses the colon, supports liver function, and flushes out toxins for a lighter, more energized body.

Heart and Blood Health

Helps normalize blood pressure, stabilize blood sugar levels, and regulate cholesterol naturally.

Men and Women's Health

Addresses fertility challenges, hormonal balance, menstrual issues, and reproductive health concerns.
